title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's research team builds Composer 2 starting from Kimi K2.5 (1T params, 32B active, 256K context) with continued pre-training on coding tasks and long-horizon reinforcement learning with auto-install. The model uses nonlinear length penalties and self-summarization to balance speed and depth while managing context limits.
